verses.sanskrit: आश्रमम् प्रति याते तु खरे खर पराक्रमे ।तान् एव औत्पातिकान् रामः सह भ्रात्रा ददर्श ह ॥३-२४-१॥
verses.text:
On observing Shuurpanakha who is speaking bitter words against him in the presence of ministers then 
Ravana is highly infuriated and queried her. [1-34-1]

verses.sanskrit: ततः शूर्पणखाम् दृष्ट्वा ब्रुवन्तीम् परुषम् वचः ।अमात्य मध्ये संकृउद्धः परिपप्रच्छ रावणः ॥३-३४-१॥
verses.text:
On observing Shuurpanakha who is speaking bitter words against him in the presence of ministers then 
Ravana is highly infuriated and queried her. [1-34-1]

verses.sanskrit: तान् उत्पातान् महाघोरान् रामो दृष्ट्वा अति अमर्षण ।प्रजानाम् अहितान् दृष्ट्वा वाक्यम् लक्ष्मणम् अब्रवीत् ॥३-२४-२॥
verses.text:
"Who is Rama? How brave he is? Of what mien and what calibre he is? And for what reason he entered the 
highly inscrutable Dandaka forest? [1-34-2]

verses.sanskrit: कः च रामः कथम् वीर्यः किम् रूपः किम् पराक्रमः ।किम् अर्थम् दण्डकारण्यम् प्रविष्टः च सुदुस्तरम् ॥३-३४-२॥
verses.text:
"Who is Rama? How brave he is? Of what mien and what calibre he is? And for what reason he entered the 
highly inscrutable Dandaka forest? [1-34-2]

verses.sanskrit: इमान् पश्य महाबाहो सर्व भूत अपहारिणः ।समुत्थितान् महा उत्पातान् संहर्तुम् सर्व राक्षसान् ॥३-२४-३॥
verses.text:
"What is the weapon of that Rama by whom these many demons are killed in war, likewise Duushana and 
Trishira are killed, and even the unkillable Khara is killed? Oh, lady with fascinating limbs, who disfigured 
you? That you tell. [1-34-3, 4a]

verses.sanskrit: आयुधम् किम् च रामस्य येन ते राक्षसाः हता ।खरः च निहतः संख्ये दूषणः त्रिशिराः तथा ॥३-३४-३॥
verses.text:
"What is the weapon of that Rama by whom these many demons are killed in war, likewise Duushana and 
Trishira are killed, and even the unkillable Khara is killed? Oh, lady with fascinating limbs, who disfigured 
you? That you tell. [1-34-3, 4a]

verses.sanskrit: अमी रुधिर धाराः तु विसृजंतो खर स्वनाः ।व्योम्नि मेघा निवर्तन्ते परुषा गर्दभ अरुणाः ॥३-२४-४॥
verses.text:
When the king of demons has asked her thus, she that demoness Shuurpanakha who is in a fit of fury then 
commenced to describe Rama in the point of fact. [3-34-4b, 5a]

verses.sanskrit: तत् त्वम् ब्रूहि मनोज्ञान्गी केन त्वम् च विरूपिता ।इति उक्ता राक्षस इन्द्रेण राक्षसी क्रोध मूर्च्छिता ॥३-३४-४॥
verses.text:
When the king of demons has asked her thus, she that demoness Shuurpanakha who is in a fit of fury then 
commenced to describe Rama in the point of fact. [3-34-4b, 5a]

verses.sanskrit: स धूमाः च शराः सर्वे मम युद्ध अभिनन्दिताः ।रुक्म पृष्ठानि चापानि विचेष्टन्ते विचक्षण ॥३-२४-५॥
verses.text:
"Dasharatha's son Rama is the one with inescapable arms and keen-eyed, but has jute-cloths and skin 
of black-deer for his dress, yet in semblance he is similar to the Love-god. [3-34-5b, 6a]

verses.sanskrit: ततो रामम् यथा न्यायम् आख्यातुम् उपचक्रमे ।दीर्घबाहुः विशालाक्षः चीर कृष्ण अजिन अम्बरः ॥३-३४-५॥
verses.text:
"Dasharatha's son Rama is the one with inescapable arms and keen-eyed, but has jute-cloths and skin 
of black-deer for his dress, yet in semblance he is similar to the Love-god. [3-34-5b, 6a]

verses.sanskrit: यादृशा इह कूजन्ति पक्षिणो वन चारिणः ।अग्रतो नः भयम् प्राप्तम् संशयो जीवितस्य च ॥३-२४-६॥
verses.text:
"Yanking out a bow with golden fillets, and that is similar to the bow of Indra in its shine, he strews 
candent iron-arrows that simulate snakes with deadly poison. [3-34-6b, 7a]

verses.sanskrit: कन्दर्प सम रूपः च रामो दशरथ आत्मजः ।शक्र चाप निभम् चापम् विकृष्य कनकांगदम् ॥३-३४-६॥
verses.text:
"Yanking out a bow with golden fillets, and that is similar to the bow of Indra in its shine, he strews 
candent iron-arrows that simulate snakes with deadly poison. [3-34-6b, 7a]

verses.sanskrit: संप्रहारः तु सुमहान् भविष्यति न संशयः ।अयम् आख्याति मे बाहुः स्फुरमाणो मुहुर् मुहुः ॥३-२४-७॥
verses.text:
"It has become imperceivable for me to me to see when and how he drew his ghastly arrows from quiver 
on the battleground; or, stretching his bow admitting those arrows on bowstring - no; or, his releasing 
those sharp edged arrows from the bow - no; why them, that great mighty Rama himself has become imperceptible 
in the fastness of his action. [3-34-7b, 8a]

verses.sanskrit: दीप्तान् क्षिपति नाराचान् सर्पान् इव महा विषान् ।न आददानम् शरान् घोरान् न मुंचंतम् महाबलम् ॥३-३४-७॥
verses.text:
"It has become imperceivable for me to me to see when and how he drew his ghastly arrows from quiver 
on the battleground; or, stretching his bow admitting those arrows on bowstring - no; or, his releasing 
those sharp edged arrows from the bow - no; why them, that great mighty Rama himself has become imperceptible 
in the fastness of his action. [3-34-7b, 8a]

verses.sanskrit: संनिकर्षे तु नः शूर जयम् शत्रोः पराजयम् ।सुप्रभम् च प्रसन्नम् च तव वक्त्रम् हि लक्ष्यते ॥३-२४-८॥
verses.text:
"As with a crop of grain devastated by a hailstorm of Indra, I could only see that best army while it 
is being annihilated with a downpour of arrows. [3-34-8b, 9a]

verses.sanskrit: न कार्मुकम् विकर्षन्तम् रामम् पश्यामि संयुगे ।हन्यमानम् तु तत् सैन्यम् पश्यामि शर वृष्टिभिः ॥३-३४-८॥
verses.text:
"As with a crop of grain devastated by a hailstorm of Indra, I could only see that best army while it 
is being annihilated with a downpour of arrows. [3-34-8b, 9a]

verses.sanskrit: उद्यतानाम् हि युद्धार्थम् येषाम् भवति लक्ष्मणः ।निष्प्रभम् वदनम् तेषाम् भवति आयुः परिक्षयः ॥३-२४-९॥
verses.text:
"Thus a lone foot-soldier with his excruciating arrows has exterminated fourteen thousand demons with 
fiendish might, including Duushana, and along withKhara, say, within one and half hours. [3-34-9b,10]

verses.sanskrit: इन्द्रेण इव उत्तमम् सस्यम् आहतम् तु अश्म वृष्टिभिः ।रक्षसाम् भीम वीर्याणाम् सहस्राणि चतुर्दश ॥३-३४-९॥
verses.text:
"Thus a lone foot-soldier with his excruciating arrows has exterminated fourteen thousand demons with 
fiendish might, including Duushana, and along withKhara, say, within one and half hours. [3-34-9b,10]

verses.sanskrit: रक्षसाम् नर्दताम् घोरः श्रूयते अयम् महाध्वनिः ।आहतानाम् च भेरीणाम् राक्षसैः क्रूर कर्मभिः ॥३-२४-१०॥
निहतानि शरैः तीक्ष्णैः तेन एकेन पदातिना ।अर्धाधिक मुहूर्तेन खरः च सह दूषणः ॥३-३४-१०॥
अनागत विधानम् तु कर्तव्यम् शुभम् इच्छता ।आपदम् शंकमानेन पुरुषेण विपश्चिता ॥३-२४-११॥
verses.text:
"Accorded is the protection to the sages, and Dandaka is made as a snuggest place for them. I am the 
lone one somehow let off by such a high-minded Rama, of course, on humiliating me by cutting my nose 
and ears. Maybe, it is because he is hesitant of woman-slaughter for he is a well-versed soul. [1-34-11, 
12]

verses.sanskrit: ऋषीणाम् अभयम् दत्तम् कृत क्षेमाः च दण्डकाः ॥३-३४-११॥
verses.text:
"Accorded is the protection to the sages, and Dandaka is made as a snuggest place for them. I am the 
lone one somehow let off by such a high-minded Rama, of course, on humiliating me by cutting my nose 
and ears. Maybe, it is because he is hesitant of woman-slaughter for he is a well-versed soul. [1-34-11, 
12]

verses.sanskrit: तस्मात् गृहीत्वा वैदेहीम् शर पाणिः धनुर् धरः ।गुहाम् आश्रय शैलस्य दुर्गाम् पादप संकुलाम् ॥३-२४-१२॥
एका कथंचित् मुक्ता अहम् परिभूय महात्मना ।स्त्री वधम् शंकमानेन रामेण विदितात्मना ॥३-३४-१२॥
प्रतिकूलितुम् इच्छामि न हि वाक्यम् इदम् त्वया ।शापितो मम पादाभ्याम् गम्यताम् वत्स मा चिरम् ॥३-२४-१३॥
verses.text:
"A highly resplendent one who by his trait matches his brother in bravery, an adherent and a devotee 
of his brother, such a stout-hearted one is Rama's brother known as Lakshmana. [1-34-13]

verses.sanskrit: भ्राता च अस्य महातेजा गुणतः तुल्य विक्रमः ।अनुरक्तः च भक्तः च लक्ष्मणो नाम वीर्यवान् ॥३-३४-१३॥
verses.text:
"A highly resplendent one who by his trait matches his brother in bravery, an adherent and a devotee 
of his brother, such a stout-hearted one is Rama's brother known as Lakshmana. [1-34-13]

verses.sanskrit: त्वम् हि शूरः च बलवान् हन्या एतान् न संशयः ।स्वयम् निहन्तुम् इच्छमि सर्वान् एव निशाचरान् ॥३-२४-१४॥
verses.text:
"That Lakshmana is an easily irritable one, he is not that easily invincible, an easy victor, but not 
an easygoing valiant, yet he is an intellectual at ease, and a mighty one who does not ease off, such 
a Lakshmana is the perpetual right-hand and the peripherally moving life of Rama. [1-34-14]

verses.sanskrit: अमर्षी दुर्जयो जेता विक्रान्तो बुद्धिमान् बली ।रामस्य दक्षिणे बाहुः नित्यम् प्राणो बहिः चरः ॥३-३४-१४॥
verses.text:
"That Lakshmana is an easily irritable one, he is not that easily invincible, an easy victor, but not 
an easygoing valiant, yet he is an intellectual at ease, and a mighty one who does not ease off, such 
a Lakshmana is the perpetual right-hand and the peripherally moving life of Rama. [1-34-14]

verses.sanskrit: एवम् उक्तः तु रामेण लक्ष्मणः सह सीतया ।शरान् आदाय चापम् च गुहाम् दुर्गाम् समाश्रयत् ॥३-२४-१५॥
verses.text:
"But, one with her broad-eyes, face similar to the full-moon is the dear and wedded wife of Rama, and 
she always takes delight in the well-being of her dear one, namely Rama. [1-34-15]

verses.sanskrit: रामस्य तु विशालाक्षी पूर्णेन्दु सदृश आनना ।धर्म पत्नी प्रिया नित्यम् भर्तृः प्रिय हिते रता ॥३-३४-१५॥
verses.text:
"But, one with her broad-eyes, face similar to the full-moon is the dear and wedded wife of Rama, and 
she always takes delight in the well-being of her dear one, namely Rama. [1-34-15]

verses.sanskrit: तस्मिन् प्रविष्टे तु गुहाम् लक्ष्मणे सह सीतया ।हन्त निर्युक्तम् इति उक्त्वा रामः कवचम् आविशत् ॥३-२४-१६॥
verses.text:
"She is the one with lengthy hairdo, her nose and thighs are fine, and that glorious one with fine looks 
is the wife of Rama, and she is beaming forth like a sylvan deity situated in that woodland, who in 
turn is like Goddess Lakshmi in a temporal form. [1-34-16]

verses.sanskrit: सा सुकेशी सुनासोरुः सुरूपा च यशस्विनी ।देवत इव वनस्थ अस्यराजते श्रीर् इव अपरा ॥३-३४-१६॥
verses.text:
"She is the one with lengthy hairdo, her nose and thighs are fine, and that glorious one with fine looks 
is the wife of Rama, and she is beaming forth like a sylvan deity situated in that woodland, who in 
turn is like Goddess Lakshmi in a temporal form. [1-34-16]

verses.sanskrit: स तेन अग्नि निकाशेन कवचेन विभूषितः ।बभूव रामः तिमिरे महान् अग्निर् इव उत्थितः ॥३-२४-१७॥
verses.text:
"She has a complexion mathing the shade of refined gold, her nails are rosy and jutting, and she with 
her curvaceous hips and slim waist is the daughter of King of Videha, and known as Seetha. [1-34-17]

verses.sanskrit: तप्त कांचन वर्ण आभा रक्त तुंग नखी शुभा ।सीता नाम वरारोहा वैदेही तनु मध्यमा ॥३-३४-१७॥
verses.text:
"She has a complexion mathing the shade of refined gold, her nails are rosy and jutting, and she with 
her curvaceous hips and slim waist is the daughter of King of Videha, and known as Seetha. [1-34-17]

verses.sanskrit: स चापम् उद्यम्य महत् शरान् आदाय वीर्यवान् ।संबभूव अवस्थितः तत्र ज्या स्वनैः पूरयन् दिशः ॥३-२४-१८॥
verses.text:
"So far I have not seen any goddess with such a comeliness; a gandharva female - no; a yaksha female 
- no; a kinnara female - no; and a woman, no, not on the face of earth! [1-34-18]

verses.sanskrit: न एव देवी न गंधर्वा न यक्षी न च किंनरी ।तथा रूपा मया नारी दृष्ट पूर्वा महीतले ॥३-३४-१८॥
verses.text:
"So far I have not seen any goddess with such a comeliness; a gandharva female - no; a yaksha female 
- no; a kinnara female - no; and a woman, no, not on the face of earth! [1-34-18]

verses.sanskrit: ततो देवाः सगन्धर्वाः सिद्धाः च सह चारणैः ।समेयुः च महात्मनो युद्ध दर्शन कांक्षया ॥३-२४-१९॥
verses.text:
"To whom Seetha becomes a wife and around whom she gladly throws her arms after such a marriage, he 
lives more grandly than Indra in all the worlds. [1-34-19]

verses.sanskrit: यस्य सीता भवेत् भार्या यम् च हृष्टा परिष्वजेत् ।अति जीवेत् स सर्वेषु लोकेषु अपि पुरंदरात् ॥३-३४-१९॥
verses.text:
"To whom Seetha becomes a wife and around whom she gladly throws her arms after such a marriage, he 
lives more grandly than Indra in all the worlds. [1-34-19]

verses.sanskrit: ऋषयः च महात्मनो लोके ब्रह्मर्षि सत्तमाः ।समेत्य च ऊचुः सहिताः ते अन्योन्यम् पुण्य कर्मणः ॥३-२४-२०॥
verses.text:
"She is a highly gracious lady, laudable by her bodily structure, incomparable by her appearance, and 
she will become a seemly wife of yours, and you too will become a best husband of hers. [1-34-20]

verses.sanskrit: सा सुशीला वपुः श्लाघ्या रूपेण अप्रतिमा भुवि ।तव अनुरूपा भार्या सा त्वम् च तस्याः पतिः वरः ॥३-३४-२०॥
verses.text:
"She is a highly gracious lady, laudable by her bodily structure, incomparable by her appearance, and 
she will become a seemly wife of yours, and you too will become a best husband of hers. [1-34-20]

verses.sanskrit: स्वस्ति गो ब्राह्मणानाम् च लोकानाम् च इति संस्थिताः ।जयताम् राघवो युद्धे पौलस्त्यान् रजनी चरान् ॥३-२४-२१॥
verses.text:
"Oh, mighty shouldered brother, but when I ventured to bring her as your wife, whose hips are broad, 
bosom fat and bulgy, face excellent, that cruel Lakshmana disfigured me. [1-34-21, 22a]

verses.sanskrit: ताम् तु विस्तीर्ण जघनाम् पीन उत्तुंग पयो धराम् ।भार्या अर्थे तु तव आनेतुम् उद्यता अहम् वर आननाम् ॥३-३४-२१॥
verses.text:
"Oh, mighty shouldered brother, but when I ventured to bring her as your wife, whose hips are broad, 
bosom fat and bulgy, face excellent, that cruel Lakshmana disfigured me. [1-34-21, 22a]

verses.sanskrit: चक्र हस्तो यथा युद्धे सर्वान् असुर पुंगवान् ।एवम् उक्त्वा पुनः प्र ऊचुः आलोक्य च परस्परम् ॥३-२४-२२॥
verses.text:
"You too will become a groveller at the arrows Lover-god in case you now see Vaidehi with a face shining 
like full-moon. [1-34-22, 23a]

verses.sanskrit: ताम् तु दृष्ट्वा अद्य वैदेहीम् पूर्ण चन्द्र निभ आननाम् ॥३-३४-२२॥
verses.text:
"You too will become a groveller at the arrows Lover-god in case you now see Vaidehi with a face shining 
like full-moon. [1-34-22, 23a]

verses.sanskrit: चतुर्दश सहस्राणि रक्षसाम् भीम कर्मणाम् ।एकः च रामो धर्मात्मा कथम् युद्धम् भविष्यति ॥३-२४-२३॥
verses.text:
"Hence, if you hatch an opinion to make her as your wife, and if you aspire success, now itself quickly 
put your best foot, namely your right foot, forward. [1-34-23]

verses.sanskrit: मन्मथस्य शराणाम् च त्वम् विधेयो भविष्यसि ।यदि तस्याम् अभिप्रायो भार्या अर्थे तव जायते ।शीघ्रम् उद् ध्रियताम् पादो जयार्थम् इह दक्षिणः ॥३-३४-२३॥
verses.text:
"Hence, if you hatch an opinion to make her as your wife, and if you aspire success, now itself quickly 
put your best foot, namely your right foot, forward. [1-34-23]

verses.sanskrit: इति राजर्षयः सिद्धाः स गणाः च द्विजर्षभाः ।जात कौतूहलात् तस्थुर् विमानस्थाः च देवता ॥३-२४-२४॥
verses.text:
"Oh, the king of demons Ravana, if this advise of mine is pleasing to you, let this idea be actualised 
without any shilly-shallying in your mind. [1-34-24]

verses.sanskrit: रोचते यदि ते वाक्यम् मम एतत् राक्षसेश्वर ।क्रियताम् निर्विशंकेन वचनम् मम रावण ॥३-३४-२४॥
verses.text:
"Oh, the king of demons Ravana, if this advise of mine is pleasing to you, let this idea be actualised 
without any shilly-shallying in your mind. [1-34-24]

verses.sanskrit: आविष्टम् तेजसा रामम् संग्राम शिरसि स्थितम् ।दृष्ट्वा सर्वाणि भूतानि भयात् विव्यथिरे तदा ॥३-२४-२५॥
verses.text:
"Oh, king of the demons, realise your stout-heartedness, and oh, great mighty one, let that immaculately 
limbed Seetha be abducted to become your wife. [1-34-25]

verses.sanskrit: विज्ञाय इह आत्म शक्तिम् च क्रियताम् च महाबल ।सीता तव अनवद्यांगी भार्यत्वे राक्षसेश्वर ॥३-३४-२५॥
verses.text:
"Oh, king of the demons, realise your stout-heartedness, and oh, great mighty one, let that immaculately 
limbed Seetha be abducted to become your wife. [1-34-25]

verses.sanskrit: रूपम् अप्रतिमम् तस्य रामस्य अक्लिष्ट कर्मणः ।बभूव रूपम् क्रुद्धस्य रुद्रस्य इव महात्मनः ॥३-२४-२६॥
verses.text:
"On recognising that Rama with his straight shooting arrows destroyed the night-walkers positioned at 
Janasthaana, and further on distinguishing that Duushana, and even Khara, is dispatched, it is apt of 
you to awake to a workable action." Thus Shuurpanakha has earbashed Ravana. [1-34-26]

verses.sanskrit: निशम्य रामेण शरैः अजिह्मगैःहतान् जनस्थान गतान् निशाचरान् ।खरम् च दृष्ट्वा निहतम् च दूषणम्त्वम् अद्य कृत्यम् प्रतिपत्तुम् अर्हसि ॥३-३४-२६॥
verses.text:
"On recognising that Rama with his straight shooting arrows destroyed the night-walkers positioned at 
Janasthaana, and further on distinguishing that Duushana, and even Khara, is dispatched, it is apt of 
you to awake to a workable action." Thus Shuurpanakha has earbashed Ravana. [1-34-26]

verses.sanskrit: इति संभाष्यमाणो तु देव गंधर्व चारणैः ।ततो गंभीर निर्ह्रादम् घोर चर्म आयुध ध्वजम् ॥३-२४-२७॥
अनीकम् यातुधानानाम् समन्तात् प्रत्यदृश्यत ।वीर आलापान् विसृजताम् अन्योन्यम् अभिगच्छताम् ॥३-२४-२८॥
चापानि विस्फरयताम् जृंभताम् च अपि अभीक्ष्णशः ।विप्रघुष्ट स्वनानाम् च दुंदुभीम् च अपि निघ्नताम् ॥३-२४-२९॥
तेषाम् सुतुमुलः शब्दः पूरयामास तद् वनम् ।तेन शब्देन वित्रस्ताः श्वापदा वन चारिणः ॥३-२४-३०॥
दुद्रुवुः यत्र निःशब्दम् पृष्ठतो न अवलोकयन् ।तत् च अनीकम् महावेगम् रामम् समनुवर्तत ॥३-२४-३१॥
घृत नाना प्रहरणम् गंभीरम् सागरोपमम् ।रामो अपि चारयन् चक्षुः सर्वतो रण पण्डितः ॥३-२४-३२॥
ददर्श खर सैन्यम् तत् युद्ध अभिमुखो गतः ।वितत्य च धनुर् भीमम् तूण्याः च उद्धृत्य सायकान् ॥३-२४-३३॥
क्रोधम् आहारयत् तीव्रम् वधार्थम् सर्व रक्षसाम् ।दुष्प्रेक्ष्यश्चाभवत्क्रुद्धोयुगान्ताग्निरिवज्वलन् - यद्वा -दुष्प्रेक्ष्यः च अभवत् क्रुद्धो युगान्त अग्निः इव ज्वलन् ॥३-२४-३४॥
तम् दृष्ट्वा तेजसा आविष्टम् प्राव्यथन् वन देवताः ।तस्य रुष्ट्स्य रूपम् तु रामस्य ददृशे तदा ।दक्षस्य इव क्रतुम् हन्तुम् उद्यतस्य पिनाकिनी ॥३-२४-३५॥
तत् कार्मुकैः आभरणैः रथैः चतत् वर्माभिः च अग्नि समान वर्णैः ।बभूव सैन्यम् पिशित अशनिनाम्सूर्य उदये नीलम् इव अभ्र जालम् ॥३-२४-३६॥
